items.label: ⚙  SET UP
items.description: Docker UP 前にグループ設定ファイルを配置

items.label: 🐳 Docker Menu
items.description: コンテナの起動・停止・ログ確認

items.label: 💯 Manual TEST RUN
items.description: 個別テストの手動実行

action.cmd: rm -f apps/e2e/src/single-user.*.json && cp apps/e2e/work/single-user.A* apps/e2e/src/. && cp apps/e2e/work/cron-schedule.Agroup.json apps/e2e/cron-schedule.json && echo '👌 Agroup setup complete.'
action.label: Agroup setup

action.cmd: rm -f apps/e2e/src/single-user.*.json && cp apps/e2e/work/single-user.B* apps/e2e/src/. && cp apps/e2e/work/cron-schedule.Bgroup.json apps/e2e/cron-schedule.json && echo '👌 Bgroup setup complete.'
action.label: Bgroup setup

action.cmd: rm -f apps/e2e/src/single-user.*.json && cp apps/e2e/work/single-user.C* apps/e2e/src/. && cp apps/e2e/work/cron-schedule.Cgroup.json apps/e2e/cron-schedule.json && echo '👌 Cgroup setup complete.'

action.cmd: rm -f apps/e2e/src/single-user.*.json && cp apps/e2e/work/single-user.E* apps/e2e/src/. && cp apps/e2e/work/cron-schedule.Egroup.json apps/e2e/cron-schedule.json && echo '👌 Egroup setup complete.'

action.cmd: rm -f apps/e2e/src/single-user.*.json && cp apps/e2e/work/single-user.F* apps/e2e/src/. && cp apps/e2e/work/cron-schedule.Fgroup.json apps/e2e/cron-schedule.json && echo '👌 Fgroup setup complete.'
action.label: Fgroup setup

action.cmd: docker compose up -d
action.label: docker compose up

action.cmd: docker compose down
action.label: docker compose down

action.cmd: docker compose ps
action.label: docker compose ps

action.cmd: docker compose logs -f
action.label: docker compose logs

action.message: コンテナ・ボリュームを全て削除しますか？

onYes.cmd: docker compose down -v --rmi all && echo 'All deleted.'
onYes.label: docker compose down -v --rmi all

action.cmd: docker compose exec playwright bash -c 'TEST_BASE=single-user.Agroup001.json pnpm test'
action.label: Agroup001
